title: The Silent Partner
description: Use the clues to identify the one ingredient that always mixes to neutral with the target ingredient.

hints.text: Find the ingredient whose alchemical is the direct opposite of ingredient 7. Two alchemicals are direct opposites when their mix is always neutral — all three colour aspects have opposite signs.
Ingredient 7 has alchemical properties: R- G+ B+. Its direct opposite has all signs flipped. Check which remaining possible alchemicals always mix to neutral with it.
Ingredient 7 = nPp. Its direct opposite is ingredient 8 = pNn.
